subcodes.first_line: Hallowed praise, sanctified above all mention and utterance, befitteth the Desire of all contingent beings, Who through a single drop from the ocean of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مقصود امکان را لایق و سزاست که بیک قطره از دریای جود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @creation of the world
